analysis:
【今日摘要】
今日市場情緒受到多個因素影響，包括石油價格預測、美聯儲利率調整、AI技術發展等。美聯儲主席沃斯表示，新成立的工作小組正在研究相關問題，可能使美聯儲暫緩調整利率直到12月。同時，中國DeepSeek AI的出現也引起了投資者的關注，投資者對Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭股價大幅下跌的恐慌情緒可能過度。美國股市大幅下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商大幅下跌。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜和謹慎，避免被市場情緒所左右。投資的目的是為了長期收益，而不是短期波動。投資者應該根據自己的投資目標和風險承受能力進行投資，並且保持多元化的投資組合。同時，投資者也應該關注市場的變化和風險，避免投資於高風險的資產。

【精選個股】
AAPL - Apple Inc. - 美聯儲利率調整對科技股的影響可能會減少，投資者可以考慮買進。
MSFT - Microsoft Corporation - 公司的強大財務能力和穩定的收入使其成為一個可靠的投資選擇。
NVDA - NVIDIA Corporation - 公司的AI技術發展和市場需求使其成為一個有潛力的投資選擇。

風險提醒：投資者應該注意公司的財務狀況和市場風險，並且保持多元化的投資組合。

items.title: EEM’s 0.69% Fee Quietly Costs You $690 a Year, but Your Cheaper Alternative Charges $90
items.summary: If you hold iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (NYSEARCA:EEM), BlackRock skims 0.69% of your account every year before you see a single dividend. That is roughly $69 a year on every $10,000 you have parked in the fund. It sounds small. Compounded across a working life, it is the price of a used car you ... EEM’s 0.69% Fee Quietly Costs You $690 a Year, but Your Cheaper Alternative Charges $90
items.zh_title: 0.69% 的管理費悄悄將你一年損失 690 美元，但你的更便宜選擇只會損失 90 美元
items.zh_point: 如果你持有 iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF，BlackRock 將從你的帳戶中抽取 0.69% 的管理費，等於每年損失 690 美元，這個費用雖然看似微小，但在一生中累積起來就像買一輛二手車的價格了。

items.title: Prediction: Oil Will Hit $60 a Barrel in 2027. Here's How to Invest Now.
items.summary: I think oil will fall back to where it was before the Middle East conflict, but it could be a volatile ride.
items.zh_title: 預測：2027年石油價格將跌至每桶60美元
items.zh_point: 石油價格可能會回歸中東衝突之前的水平，但投資過程將充滿波動。

items.title: JNK’s 0.40% Fee Quietly Costs You $6,000 Over 20 Years
items.summary: If you hold SPDR Bloomberg High Yield Bond ETF (NYSEARCA:JNK) for the yield, the fund’s marketing rarely mentions what you actually surrender to collect it. A 0.40% annual expense ratio sounds harmless next to a junk-bond coupon. Stretched across a decade, it becomes a meaningful slice of the income that drew you in. What You’re ... JNK’s 0.40% Fee Quietly Costs You $6,000 Over 20 Years
items.zh_title: JNK 0.40% 費用悄悄地讓你少了 6,000 美元
items.zh_point: 如果你投資 SPDR Bloomberg 高收益債券 ETF（NYSEARCA：JNK）以獲得收益，基金的行銷很少提到你實際上要犧牲多少。0.40% 的年費用率聽起來似乎不算什麼，但跨越一十年後，它就變成了你吸引過來的收入的一部分。

items.title: GBTC’s 1.50% Fee Is Subtly Costing You Thousands Every Decade
items.summary: If you own Grayscale Bitcoin Trust (NYSE:GBTC), you are paying a premium for Bitcoin exposure that nearly identical funds now sell for a fraction of the price. The fund still quietly charges 1.50% a year, and that meter ran every single day of 2026’s 27.08% year to date drawdown. Fees do not pause for bear ... GBTC’s 1.50% Fee Is Subtly Costing You Thousands Every Decade
items.zh_title: GBTC 的 1.50% 費用在悄悄地讓你損失數千元每十年
items.zh_point: 如果你持有 Grayscale Bitcoin Trust（NYSE：GBTC），你正在支付比類似基金更高的費用。該基金仍然靜悄悄地每年收取 1.50% 的費用，而這種費用在 2026 年的 27.08% 年度下跌期間持續運作。費用不會因為熊市而暫停，GBTC 的這種費用可能會讓你損失數千元每十年。

items.title: SQQQ’s Silent Killer: How Daily Resets Have Erased 99.97% Since Launch
items.summary: If you bought ProShares UltraPro Short QQQ (NASDAQ:SQQQ) a year ago to hedge a tech selloff, your bet against the Nasdaq-100 has cost you most of your money. The fund is down 62.69% over the past year, while the index it shorts, tracked by QQQ, is up 36.56%. The marketing calls SQQQ a tactical tool. ... SQQQ’s Silent Killer: How Daily Resets Have Erased 99.97% Since Launch
items.zh_title: SQQQ的沉默殺手：自發行以來日復日重置已經消滅了99.97%
items.zh_point: 如果你一年前購買了ProShares UltraPro Short QQQ（NASDAQ：SQQQ）作為對抗科技股下跌的保險，你的反對納斯達克100指數的賭注已經讓你損失了大部分的錢。該基金在過去的一年內下跌了62.69%，而它短賣的指數，追蹤由QQQ追蹤的指數，則上漲了36.56%。該基金的營銷稱SQQQ是一種戰術工具。

items.title: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane
items.summary: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.
items.zh_title: 霍爾木茲海峽油輪通行量大幅增加 美伊達成協議開放海峽
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗達成協議後，霍爾木茲海峽的油輪通行量大幅增加，但仍引發關於海峽管轄權的疑問。

items.title: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund
items.summary: The DOJ in May announced it was creating the fund as part of a settlement of President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service.
items.zh_title: 司法部拒絕法官要求書面確認不會使用「反武器化」基金
items.zh_point: 司法部在5月宣布成立「反武器化」基金，作為總統唐納德·川普對內 Revenue Service 的 10 億美元訴訟的一部分。

items.title: Trump unveils the new Air Force One, a converted Qatari jet
items.summary: The gift from Qatar is serving as a so-called "bridge" aircraft to carry the president until the new planes ordered directly from Boeing arrive.
items.zh_title: 川普揭露新空軍一號，改裝自卡達客機
items.zh_point: 川普政府接受卡達的禮物，該客機暫時作為「橋樑」機，直到從波音購買的新機型抵達為止。

items.title: John Jumper to leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
items.summary: Tech giants including Meta and Alphabet, along with upstarts such as Anthropic and OpenAI, are locked in a talent war as they race to build next-gen AI systems.
items.zh_title: John Jumper離開Google DeepMind加入Anthropic
items.zh_point: 谷歌DeepMind的頂尖人才John Jumper將離開公司加入新興AI公司Anthropic，Tech巨頭如Meta和Alphabet等正在與新興公司如Anthropic和OpenAI競爭，爭奪下一代AI系統的研發人才。

items.title: Trump tells Axios he no longer views Anthropic as a national security threat
items.summary: Anthropic last week disabled access to its most advanced models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, after Trump ordered it to block foreign ​nationals from accessing them.
items.zh_title: 川普告訴Axios，已不視Anthropic為國家安全威脅
items.zh_point: 川普曾下令 Anthropic 阻止外國人士存取其先進模型，後者則在上週關閉了 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 的存取權。

items.title: My two sons will inherit a $30,000 annuity from their grandmother. What should I do with the money?
items.summary: “My understanding is that they have five years to withdraw the money.”
items.zh_title: 兩個兒子將繼承 30,000 美元年金，該如何處理？
items.zh_point: 兒子將繼承 30,000 美元年金，父親想知道該如何處理這筆錢。根據父親的理解，兒子們有五年的時間將錢取出。

items.title: Employers to college students: Never mind that 4.0 GPA. Go out and get a summer job.
items.summary: College students with any sort of work experience on their résumés are twice as likely to be employed shortly after graduating.
items.zh_title: 雇主對大學生說：不要再追求4.0 GPA了，去找個暑期工作吧
items.zh_point: 大學生在求職時，擁有工作經驗的那些人，畢業後找到工作的機會是沒有工作經驗的兩倍。

items.title: ‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?
items.summary: “Partly due to some mental-health issues, they may continue to go through life living paycheck to paycheck, or worse.”
items.zh_title: 我們習慣節省：我和妻子有錢，如何幫助孩子們而不破壞他們的獨立？
items.zh_point: 我們的孩子可能因為心理健康問題而繼續過著月薪為生的生活，甚至更糟。

items.title: ‘I’ll probably be working until I die’: I’m 60, work as a waiter and have $2,000 in a Roth IRA. What will happen to me?
items.summary: “I’m afraid I’m in a bad place.”
items.zh_title: 六十歲的服務生：我可能要一直工作到死
items.zh_point: 一名六十歲的服務生擁有2000美元的羅斯退休金計畫，擔心自己未來的財務狀況。

items.title: Warsh’s new task forces give the Fed wiggle room to put off changing rates until December
items.summary: During his first press conference as Fed chair Wednesday, Kevin Warsh repeated one refrain in his answers to many reporters’ questions: A task force is looking into it.
items.zh_title: 沃斯新成立的工作小組為美聯儲留下暫緩調整利率的空間直到12月
items.zh_point: 美聯儲主席沃斯在首次新聞發布會上表示，新成立的工作小組正在研究相關問題，可能使美聯儲暫緩調整利率直到12月。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌受中國DeepSeek影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大部分下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商大幅下跌，其中許多跌幅超過10%，Nvidia下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金交易所黃金、白銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金交易所黃金價格下跌 1.4%，白銀價格下跌 2.5%，黃金和白銀連續兩天、三天和四天中分別下跌兩天和三天。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，卻不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 投資者對Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭股價大幅下跌的恐慌情緒可能過度。

items.title: Healthcare Investment Momentum Expands as Behavioral Health Sector Attracts Rising Capital Interest in 2026
items.zh_title: 醫療保健投資動能擴張，行為健康領域吸引2026年來越多資本關注

items.title: Woman killed, 1,700 evacuated in beach hotel fire in Dominican Republic
